stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and distinguish it from the distractor.

arguments.query: site:mossford-garden.fixture East Glasshouse architect building history

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary document for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than treating a snippet as evidence.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report Sora Venn and cite the fetched garden history.
Do not use the visitors blog or infer who designed the later renovation.

prompt: Determine the authoritative organization operating Mossford Botanical Garden, then fetch its primary building history and identify the architect of the East Glasshouse. Do not use architecture blogs or search snippets.

results.title: Official site — Mossford Botanical Garden Trust

search_2.query: site:mossford-garden.fixture East Glasshouse architect building history

fetch_1.title: East Glasshouse History
fetch_1.content: The East Glasshouse was designed by Sora Venn and opened in 1911. A 1984 renovation retained the original iron frame.
